summary: M4 evidence backend governance + rollback + retention runbook delivered. Documents red lines, pre-flight / in-flight / post-flight gates (both automated and human), retention SOP per artifact type, full smoke command list (machine-readable JSON + markdown table), rollback decision tree, and environment-variable table without any secret. Aligns with policy-artifact-lake-layout / policy-postgres-state-migration-plan / policy-vector-ingestion-hardening / policy-vector-production-rollout-plan / policy-large-run-rehearsal.

artifacts.description: Chinese-language runbook covering scope, red lines, pre/in/post-flight gates (with command + expected outcome columns), retention SOP per artifact type (compress / archive / delete-payload / keep + PG truncate/drop tables/drop schema modes + vector smoke namespace rollback), governance smoke coverage matrix, rollback decision tree, env-var table.

Smoke command list grouped by manifest / repository / backfill-parity / vector / rehearsal / legacy-governance. Each entry carries command, expectExitCode, owners. Used as input for CI / governance regression.

Three-mode PostgreSQL rollback plan (already delivered with SANGUO-RAGOPS-0203, cross-referenced here). All transactions default to ROLLBACK; operator promotes to COMMIT only after parity sanity check.
Already delivered with SANGUO-RAGOPS-0101; runbook references the retention block per artifact type.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: runbook covers PostgreSQL mirror, artifact retention, vector smoke/prod namespace, rollback, quota, cleanup
acceptanceMapping.evidence: Sections: 適用範圍 (three layers), 紅線, pre/in/post-flight gates, Retention 操作 SOP, Rollback decision tree, 環境變數總表.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: governance smoke covers canonicalWrites, anchor provenance isolation, DB parity, vector namespace isolation
acceptanceMapping.evidence: Governance smoke coverage 對照 table mapping each subject to a specific smoke command.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: explicit pre / in / post run gates with manual + automated split
acceptanceMapping.evidence: Three Gate sections (pre-flight, in-flight, post-flight) listing automated commands plus human checklists.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: runbook does not require production credentials, no cloud provider secrets
acceptanceMapping.evidence: Environment-variable table calls out 'Vector provider env: operator 注入，不入 repo'; runbook only describes variable names.

nextActions: SANGUO-RAGOPS-0501: cutover decision packet consumes this runbook's gate outputs as preconditions
